must_detect.matched_text: Security: Encryption at rest, MFA, DLP, and periodic simulations; incident notifications will follow CERT-In advisories and applicable SEBI guidance for intermediaries where relevant.

SuryQuant Capital Services Pvt. Ltd. — India Privacy and Retention Workflow Note (DPDPA)
Scope: We act as a Data Fiduciary for retail clients and a Data Processor for enterprise partners; “Data Principal” has the meaning under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023.
Collection: We capture identity and contact details via forms; Aadhaar number is not required (only masked last 4 if voluntarily provided), and PAN/GSTIN fields may show placeholders (e.g., PAN: PANNN0000X, GSTIN: 00ABCDE0000A0Z0) which are not stored as verified IDs.
Children: We do not knowingly process data of a child (under 18 years); any attempted registration is paused pending verifiable parental consent.
Use: Operational communications, account servicing, compliance training on crypto custody hygiene, ESG reporting taxonomy, cyber tabletop drills, and marketing newsletters.
Educational-only content about crypto listing mechanics, climate disclosures, blackout calendars, or tipping prohibitions is generic and not intended to relate to any specific security or price.
MNPI controls (SEBI PIT): We maintain information barriers and an insider list for engagements involving listed securities on NSE/BSE; access is role-based, time-bounded, and logged.
Positive example (restricted): Draft incident summary of a cyber intrusion at NSE-listed ArthaNova Renewables Ltd., prior to public disclosure, is treated as UPSI and stored in a segregated workspace with deal-code access and acknowledgment tracking.
Non-MNPI examples: Public ESG press releases, published commercial term sheets, and archived case studies about tokenized loyalty points are treated as non-sensitive marketing materials.
Lawful basis and consent: We rely on consent or legitimate uses under DPDPA for specified purposes; withdrawal is available without detriment except where processing is required by law.
DSAR: To access, correct, port, or erase your data, submit a request via privacy@SuryQuant.example; we will acknowledge within 7 days and respond within 30 days after identity validation.
We never request full Aadhaar, CVV, or seed phrases; forms showing “Account No: 0000-XX-9876” or “Aadhaar: XXXX-XXXX-1234” are masks and not persisted in production logs.
Retention: KYC and contract records are retained for up to 8 years post-relationship under applicable Indian record-keeping norms; training logs and insider-list entries are retained for 5 years from the relevant event.
Cross-border transfers: Primary storage is in India; limited transfers to processors in approved locations occur under contractual safeguards, transfer risk assessments, and audit rights.
Security: Encryption at rest, MFA, DLP, and periodic simulations; incident notifications will follow CERT-In advisories and applicable SEBI guidance for intermediaries where relevant.
